main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'water hammer por rampa VFD rápida tras mantenimiento → telescoping' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Shutdown + replace damaged element + reset VFD a 90s + monitorear pressure rise rate — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide actual VFD ramp time before/after — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: VFD 90s sin cambio → VFD control issue switch.
